Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Justin Chou, of Law Offices of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger, Tel. 415.981.7210, for plaintiffs;
David V. Roth, of Manning & Kass Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP, Tel. 415.217.6990, for defendants;
Jill K. Cohoe, of Manning & Kass Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP, Tel. 415.217.6990, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GOLDENVOICE LLC, AEG LIVE LLC, A&C VENTURES INC. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED with 20 days leave to amend. Plaintiff's amended pleading must state how defendants undertook to care for or render aid to him such that the liability limitations of Civil Code 1714 and Business & Professions Code 25602 do not apply. The allegations of the complaint's paragraph 7 are conclusory and insufficient to show that Williams v. Saga Enterprises, Inc. (1990) 225 Cal.App.3d 142 applies to this case. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No. 6576; Dept. 302.
